speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! You've got a great eye — this 2018 Camry LE is one of the cleanest trade-ins we've had in months. Only 78,000 miles, meticulously maintained, and you know what they say about Toyotas: you're just breaking them in at this point. I actually just had another couple looking at it yesterday, so if you're serious, now's the time to take a closer look!

text: Hey there! You've got a great eye — this 2018 Camry LE is one of the cleanest trade-ins we've had in months. Only 78,000 miles, meticulously maintained, and you know what they say about Toyotas: you're just breaking them in at this point. I actually just had another couple looking at it yesterday, so if you're serious, now's the time to take a closer look!

speaker: buyer

args.message: Well hello there! Oh my, it really does look like a lovely car in the pictures! I've always heard such good things about Toyotas - my neighbor had one that lasted forever, it seemed like. You said it was meticulously maintained - does that mean the previous owner kept up with all the oil changes and such? And does it run nice and smooth when you start it up?

text: Well hello there! Oh my, it really does look like a lovely car in the pictures! I've always heard such good things about Toyotas - my neighbor had one that lasted forever, it seemed like. You said it was meticulously maintained - does that mean the previous owner kept up with all the oil changes and such? And does it run nice and smooth when you start it up?

speaker: seller

args.message:
Oh, absolutely! You're going to love this one. The previous owner was a retired accountant — you know the type, very methodical, kept every receipt. The service history shows regular oil changes right on schedule, and we actually just did a full fluid top-off here at the dealership before putting it on the lot. 

As for how it runs? Smooth as butter, I kid you not. That 2.5-liter four-cylinder just purrs when you start it up. Toyota really perfected that engine — it's the same one they've been refining for years. No knocks, no hesitation, just reliable power. 

Tell you what, why don't you come on down and take it for a spin? Nothing beats hearing that engine for yourself. I think you'll be impressed — these Camrys really do live up to the hype. Your neighbor had the right idea!

text:

speaker: buyer

args.message:
Oh, a retired accountant - well that does sound like someone who would take good care of things! And smooth as butter sounds just wonderful. I don't need anything fancy, just something reliable to get me to church and the grocery store, you know. 

Now, I noticed the asking price is $18,495. That's just a smidge over what I was hoping to spend. Is there any wiggle room on that price, or is that pretty much set? I'm on a fixed income, you understand.

text:
Oh, a retired accountant - well that does sound like someone who would take good care of things! And smooth as butter sounds just wonderful. I don't need anything fancy, just something reliable to get me to church and the grocery store, you know. 

Now, I noticed the asking price is $18,495. That's just a smidge over what I was hoping to spend. Is there any wiggle room on that price, or is that pretty much set? I'm on a fixed income, you understand.

speaker: seller

args.message:
Oh, I completely understand being mindful of the budget — that's just smart! And honestly, for church and groceries, this Camry is absolutely perfect. You'll get wonderful gas mileage, and with Toyota's reliability, you won't be nickel-and-dimed at the mechanic.

Now, I'll be honest with you — we've priced this one very competitively. I actually saw a 2018 Camry LE with over 85,000 miles go for $19,200 at auction just last week, so we're already below market on this one. That said, I'm not here to make things difficult for nice folks like yourself.

Tell you what — why don't you tell me what number you had in mind, and let's see if we can find a way to make this work for you? I can't promise miracles, but I'd love to see this car go to someone who'll appreciate it. What were you thinking?

text:

Tell you what — why don't you tell me what number you had in mind, and let's see if we can find a way to make this work for you? I can't promise miracles, but I'd love to see this car go to someone who'll appreciate it. What were you thinking?

speaker: buyer

args.message: Well, that's very kind of you to work with me! I was really hoping to stay around $17,500 if possible. I know that's a bit less than you're asking, but it would really help me out. And I promise I'll take good care of her - I don't drive much these days, just those little trips around town. What do you think?

text: Well, that's very kind of you to work with me! I was really hoping to stay around $17,500 if possible. I know that's a bit less than you're asking, but it would really help me out. And I promise I'll take good care of her - I don't drive much these days, just those little trips around town. What do you think?

speaker: seller

args.message:
Well, I can see you're serious and I really do appreciate that. And honestly? I love that this car is going to someone who'll treat it right — just little trips to church and the store, that's the good life for a Camry!

Here's what I can do for you: I talked to my manager just this morning about moving this one, and I can bring it down to $18,000 even. That's nearly $500 off the sticker, and between you and me, that's about as low as I can go without getting myself in trouble. At that price, you're getting a meticulously maintained Toyota with years and years of reliable driving ahead of you.

Does $18,000 work for you? I'd love to get you the keys today!
